author: Jeremy Jin
description: 将 Looki 的日常数据与即时提示同步进 Obsidian，合并为按日期的「每日记忆」笔记。可配置目标文件夹，并选择是否同步图片/视频。 - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Jeremy Jin
manifest.description: Sync Looki Moments and For You into daily memory notes, with optional image/video sync.
manifest.name: Looki Sync

name: Looki Sync

releases.author: kidd911-cmd
releases.description:
Looki Sync v1.0.7 发布说明 / Release Notes
中文
Looki Sync 是一款 Obsidian 插件，用于把 Looki App 里的「Moment」和「For You」内容同步成 Obsidian 的每日记忆笔记，并可选地下载其中的图片 / 视频到本地 vault。
本次更新（v1.0.7）
在 v1.0.5 的基础上，于设置页「媒体文件夹」一项新增了一条提示，方便你把视频备份到百度网盘：
在「媒体文件夹」设置项下增加说明：若希望把同步下来的视频备份到百度网盘，可在电脑上的百度网盘客户端里，把这个文件夹（vault 中对应的实际目录，例如 Looki/media）设为「同步文件夹」，客户端便会自动把里面的视频上传到网盘。
除这条提示外，功能与 v1.0.5 完全一致（笔记同步、图片/视频下载、For You 同步等）。
  说明：本版本不内置百度网盘上传，也不要求填写任何百度 AppKey / SecretKey，因此无需申请百度开放平台审核。备份动作由你本机的百度网盘客户端完成。
如何把视频备份到百度网盘
Obsidian 设置 → Looki Sync → 记下「媒体文件夹」的路径（默认 Looki/media）。
在电脑上打开百度网盘客户端（PC 版，非网页版）。
找到「同步空间 / 同步文件夹」功能，把 vault 里对应的媒体目录（如 你的笔记库/Looki/media）添加为同步文件夹。
之后每次 Looki Sync 同步下载的视频，都会由百度网盘客户端自动上传到你的网盘，可在百度网盘 App 中查看。
  提示：这种方式视频仅保存在百度网盘，笔记里仍显示 ![[...]] 嵌入本地文件。若想笔记也直接显示图片/视频，保持「媒体开关」开启即可（文件会同时存一份在本地 vault）。
升级方法
直接替换 main.js / manifest.json / styles.css 三个文件即可，无需改动任何设置。若此前从未安装，按 Obsidian 社区插件流程搜索 Looki Sync 安装即可。
English
Looki Sync is an Obsidian plugin that syncs your Looki App "Moments" and "For You" content into daily memory notes in Obsidian, with optional downloading of images / videos into your local vault.
What's new in v1.0.7
On top of v1.0.5, this release adds a hint under the "媒体文件夹 (Media folder)" setting to help you back up videos to Baidu Netdisk:
Added a note under the "媒体文件夹 (Media folder)" setting: if you want to back up the synced videos to Baidu Netdisk, open the Baidu Netdisk PC client, add that folder (the actual vault path, e.g. Looki/media) as a "同步文件夹 (sync folder)", and the client will automatically upload the videos to the cloud.
Everything else is identical to v1.0.5 (note sync, image/video download, ForYou sync, etc.).
  Note: This version does not upload to Baidu inside the plugin and does not require any Baidu AppKey / SecretKey, so no Baidu Open Platform review is needed. The backup is handled by the Baidu Netdisk client on your own computer.
How to back up videos to Baidu Netdisk
In Obsidian → Settings → Looki Sync, note the 媒体文件夹 (Media folder) path (default Looki/media).
Open the Baidu Netdisk PC client on your computer (desktop app, not the web version).
Use its "同步空间 / 同步文件夹 (Sync folder)" feature to add the corresponding media directory inside your vault (e.g. YourVault/Looki/media) as a sync folder.
From then on, every video downloaded by Looki Sync will be automatically uploaded to your Baidu Netdisk, viewable in the Baidu Netdisk app.
  Tip: With this approach videos live in Baidu Netdisk only; notes still embed the local ![[...]] file. To display images/videos directly in notes, keep the media toggle on (files are also stored locally in the vault).
Upgrade
Simply replace main.js / manifest.json / styles.css. No settings changes required. If installing for the first time, search Looki Sync in the Obsidian community plugins browser.

releases.author: kidd911-cmd
releases.description:
Looki Sync v1.0.6 Release Notes
中文
基于 v1.0.5，本次更新很小：
在「媒体文件夹」设置项增加了一条提示：如果你希望把视频备份到百度网盘，可以在电脑上的百度网盘客户端里，把这个文件夹（vault 中对应的实际目录，例如 Looki/media）设为「同步文件夹」，客户端会自动把里面的视频上传到网盘。
其余功能与 v1.0.5 完全一致（笔记同步、图片/视频下载、ForYou 同步等）。
  说明：本版本不内置百度网盘上传，也不要求填写任何百度 AppKey / SecretKey，因此无需申请百度开放平台审核。备份由你本机的百度网盘客户端完成。
如何把视频备份到百度网盘
Obsidian 设置 → Looki Sync → 记下「媒体文件夹」的路径（默认 Looki/media）。
在电脑上打开百度网盘客户端（PC 版）。
找到「同步空间 / 同步文件夹」功能，把 vault 里对应的媒体目录（如 你的笔记库/Looki/media）添加为同步文件夹。
之后每次 Looki Sync 同步下载的视频，都会由百度网盘客户端自动上传到你的网盘。
  提示：这种方式视频只存在百度网盘，笔记里仍显示 ![[...]] 嵌入本地文件；你可在百度网盘 App 里查看已备份的视频。
English
Built on v1.0.5, this is a small update:
Added a hint under the 媒体文件夹 (Media folder) setting: if you want to back up videos to Baidu Netdisk, you can open the Baidu Netdisk PC client, add that folder (the actual vault path, e.g. Looki/media) as a "同步文件夹 (sync folder)", and the client will automatically upload the videos to the cloud.
Everything else is identical to v1.0.5 (note sync, image/video download, ForYou sync, etc.).
  Note: This version does not upload to Baidu inside the plugin and does not require any Baidu AppKey / SecretKey, so no Baidu Open Platform review is needed. Backup is handled by the Baidu Netdisk client on your own computer.
How to back up videos to Baidu Netdisk
In Obsidian → Settings → Looki Sync, note the 媒体文件夹 (Media folder) path (default Looki/media).
Open the Baidu Netdisk PC client on your computer.
Use its "同步空间 / 同步文件夹 (Sync folder)" feature to add the corresponding media directory inside your vault (e.g. YourVault/Looki/media) as a sync folder.
From then on, every video downloaded by Looki Sync will be automatically uploaded to your Baidu Netdisk by the client.
  Tip: With this approach videos live in Baidu Netdisk only; notes still embed the local ![[...]] file. You can view backed-up videos in the Baidu Netdisk app.
Tip: With this approach videos live in Baidu Netdisk only; notes still embed the local ![[...]] file. You can view backed-up videos in the Baidu Netdisk app.

releases.author: kidd911-cmd
releases.description:
中文

Looki Sync 1.0.5
修复
兼容旧版本 Obsidian：将创建文件夹所用的方法从较新的 createFolder 改为更稳定、兼容性更好的 adapter.mkdir，避免在不满足最低版本要求的 Obsidian 上触发"使用了新版本 API"的报错。
清理构建警告：移除了未使用的异常变量，让代码更干净、通过官方校验。
English

Looki Sync 1.0.5
Fixed
Compatibility with older Obsidian: Replaced the newer createFolder call with the more stable adapter.mkdir when creating folders, fixing the "uses APIs newer than the declared minAppVersion" check on older Obsidian versions.
Cleaner build: Removed an unused exception variable to eliminate the lint warning and pass validatio

releases.author: kidd911-cmd
releases.description:
Looki Sync 1.0.4
修复
自动创建目录：同步前会自动创建笔记目录与媒体子目录，不再需要手动提前建好文件夹（修复了目标文件夹不存在时报错的问题）。
图片现在能正常显示了：之前所有图片被强制保存为 .jpg，但 Looki 返回的图片实际可能是 png / webp / heic 等格式，导致 Obsidian 无法显示。现在会按真实格式保存，图片可正常预览。
区分图片与视频：笔记里的媒体嵌入现在带图标标识——🖼️ 图片、🎬 视频，一眼就能分清。
English

Looki Sync 1.0.4
Fixed
Auto-create folders: The plugin now creates the notes folder and media subfolders automatically before syncing, so you no longer need to create them manually (fixes the error when the target folder did not exist).
Images now display correctly: Previously all images were forced to save as .jpg, but Looki may return png / webp / heic, etc., which made them unviewable in Obsidian. They are now saved with their real format and render properly.
Distinguish images from videos: Media embeds in notes are now labeled with icons — 🖼️ for images and 🎬 for videos — so they are easy to tell apart.

releases.author: kidd911-cmd
releases.description: Looki Sync 首个版本：支持同步 Looki 日常数据与即时提示到 Obsidian，合并为每日记忆笔记。
